descFull: Claude Code harness for AI coding agents. Hybrid-RAG librarian picks relevant rules in 0.59 ms p95 (BM25 + vector + graph traversal); process keeper blocks writes until plan + tests approved. 276 rules / 30 mandatory across 12 domains, 6 cross-language analyzers. Neo4j + Tantivy + hnswlib + ONNX.
